title: Amid coup rumours, Xi Jinping set to be re-elected CPC President
description: The Congress, where Xi is anticipated to be re-elected for a record-breaking third term, is taking place in the midst of a large purge of top security officers ...
snippet: Chinese President Xi Jinping is set to be re-elected for a fifth term next month when the ruling Communist Party of China (CCP) holds its crucial 20th Party Con...
